leagueBriefing: Sporting Braga made a thunderous statement in their Europa League clash, overwhelming Ferencváros with a clinical four-goal display. The Portuguese side dominated from start to finish, leaving the Hungarian champions with no answers as Braga cruised toward a commanding victory.

games.headline: Braga pummels Ferencváros in four-goal Europa League masterclass
games.brief: Sporting Braga put on an offensive clinic at the Estádio Municipal de Braga, dismantling Ferencváros with ruthless efficiency. The home side utilized their superior technical ability and home-field advantage to control the tempo, scoring early and never looking back in a match that felt one-sided from the opening whistle.
bullets: Braga secured a two-goal cushion within the first 30 minutes, effectively ending the contest early.
The Portuguese side maintained 62% possession and limited Ferencváros to just a single shot on target.
Braga's wing-play was the difference maker, with three of the four goals originating from crosses into the box.
This victory marks Braga's largest margin of victory in a European knockout stage match in over a decade.
games.context: The dominant 4-0 scoreline puts Braga in a near-insurmountable position heading into the second leg in Budapest.
